channel.name: Agent Analytics / Open Orchestrators
channel.subject: Suggested addition for Open Orchestrators: Ralph Workflow

submitted_payload.suggested_entry: - [Ralph Workflow](https://codeberg.org/RalphWorkflow/Ralph-Workflow) — free and open-source composable loop framework and AI orchestrator for structured unattended coding workflows, with a strong default workflow for longer repo-native runs

why_this_action: Shared artifacts still show distribution_and_message_to_primary_repo_conversion as the live bottleneck, Apollo is already in a measurement window, Reddit is structurally failing, and Agent-Analytics/Open Orchestrators is a prepared high-fit curator lane with a public support contact. GitHub auth is unavailable here, so SMTP outreach to the maintainer support address was the strongest legitimate same-run execution path.
shared_findings_used: adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg movement is the primary success gate
market_intelligence_latest.json: reusable competitor comparisons and positioning truths
curator_outreach_queue_latest.json: Agent-Analytics target was prepared but unsent

measurement_window.success_signal: reply, list inclusion, or a new qualified backlink path that sends evaluators to the Codeberg primary repo
